account.comm.blog_intro: fr Discover what is happening across Niantic Labs!
account.comm.events.intro: fr Interact with the Lightship developer community in real life! Get support on your projects, stay up-to-date with the latest events for developers, and gain access to a large knowledge base archive.
account.comm.forum_intro: fr Interact with the Lightship developer community in real time and get support on your projects.
account.comm.interact: fr Interact with the Lightship community, get support on your projects and stay up-to-date with the latest events and news.
account.comm.intro: fr Interact with the Lightship developer community in real time! Get support on your projects, stay up-to-date with the latest events for developers, and gain access to a large knowledge base archive.

account.data_access.title: fr Data access
account.delete.email.label: fr Enter your email
account.delete.error.email_mismatch: fr The email you entered doesn’t match the email associated with your account.
account.delete.intro1: fr This operation cannot be undone
account.delete.intro2: fr . Upon deletion, your account and all associated projects, users, and API Keys will be lost immediately. This operation cannot be undone. If you want to proceed, please enter the password associated with your account.
account.download.examples.intro: fr Download these example projects to help you get familiarized with ARDK's capabilities
account.download.intro1: fr The Lightship AR Developer Kit (ARDK) is built to work with iOS, Android, and Unity. For the best experience, please ensure your development environment meets the minimum system requirements. An API license key is required for certain ARDK features.
account.download.intro2: fr Please note: We are actively developing the ARDK, so ARDK features and docs are subject to change. If you’re already using the ARDK be sure to review the release notes for each release of the ARDK to understand what changes have gone into a release. Please also review Lightship Launch Types for definitions and guidance on our Private, Public Beta and General Availability feature releases.
account.download.intro2_structured: fr Please note: We are actively developing the ARDK, so ARDK features and docs are subject to change. If you’re already using the ARDK be sure to review the <2>release notes for each release of the ARDK to understand what changes have gone into a release. Please also review <4>Lightship Launch Types for definitions and guidance on our Private, Public Beta and General Availability feature releases.
account.download.lh_assets.intro: fr Download pre-developed projects to kickstart your AR experience. Find out more at https://lightship.dev/learn
account.download.lh_assets.label: fr Lightship Hub
account.download.page_header.title: fr Download Lightship ARDK for Unity
account.download.past_releases.descripti: fr Download these previous versions of ARDK
account.download.rs_assets.intro: fr Access official Niantic Lightship trademarks, logos and brand elements
account.download.rs_assets.label: fr Brand Assets
account.download.sdk_link.label: fr Download ARDK (v{sdkVersion})
account.features.title: fr Features & roadmap
account.intercept_country.intro: fr Due to some recent changes, we need to ask for your Country/Region. Please select below - you can always edit these later on in your Settings page. Thank you!
account.intercept_country.title: fr A few things we need from you before accessing your dashboard...
form.input.email.error.invalid: fr Enter a valid email, e.g. name@example.com.

global.brand_assets.examples.title: fr Examples
global.brand_assets.intro: fr All Niantic Lightship trademarks, logos, or other brand elements are subject to Niantic Lightship’s Usage Agreement.
global.brand_assets.logo.description: fr The Niantic Lightship logo is required to be displayed on-screen during application startup, before any user interaction. The logo can exist with other logos, but must be a reasonable/readable size and duration. Minimum size required is 140px wide and 70px high.
popup.error.mesh_deletion.title: fr Mesh {{nodeId}} deletion failed
popup.error.mesh_download.description: fr Create a project and an API key, or ensure at least one API key is enabled
popup.error.mesh_download.title: fr An API key is required to download meshes
popup.error.mesh_download_fail.title: fr Downloading mesh {{nodeId}} has failed
signin.create_account.already_exists: fr Already have an account? Sign in
signin.create_account.already_exists_str: fr Already have an account? <1>Sign in</1>
signin.create_account.page.title: fr Create an account
signin.create_account.privacy_statement: fr By creating an account, I acknowledge the Niantic Privacy Policy.
signin.create_account.privacy_statement_: fr By creating an account, I acknowledge the <1>Niantic Privacy Policy</1>.
signin.signin.intro: fr Enter your credentials to access your account
signin.signin.no_account: fr Don’t have an account? Register now to begin your AR journey
signin.signin.no_account_structured: fr Don't have an account? <2>Register now</2> to begin your AR journey
signin.verify.email.successs: fr Your email address has been successfully verified, you can sign in now.
signin.verify.email.successs_structured: fr Your email address has been successfully verified, you can <2>sign in</2> now.
signin.verify_email.verify.resend_error: fr Something went wrong, please try again later. If you just changed your email or requested a verification email, please wait for another 10 minutes to request another verifcation email. If this issue persists, email support@lightship.dev for support.
